title: Meteor Impact - Prólogo
content:
Essa história é totalmente dublada dentro do jogo.É recomendado ouvir a história enquanto lê a tradução!


    
    Essa história não passou por uma revisão de tradução.Veja os Termos de Serviço para história não revisadas.Eu adoraria ter essa história revisada algum dia, se você tem interesse, entre em contanto no meu Twitter/X!

  Estação: Inverno (Fim do Ano)


  Local: Sala de AV



  Dias atuais, fim do ano.

Fuhahaha! Missão cumprida! É uma vitória incrível da Ryuseitai mais uma vez…!☆


é~♪ esse é o Resultado dos poderes de todos nós combinados! uma vitória incrível para ryuseitai…!

Kanata…! ♪ (Estende a mão para um aperto de mão)

chiaki…! ☆ (Abraça ele em vez disso)

Fuhahahaha~! (Os dois começam a rodopiar)


Ughhh… Esses dois estão agindo super animados de novo… Isso é tão deprimente, Eu quero morrer…

Ahaha, talvez o desgaste tenha deixado os dois estranhamente animados. Eles disseram que eles estão limpando tudo sem para o dia todo

hhh? Porque eles fariam uma super faxina como aquela de novo…?1 Eles querem sair e passar a noite juntos…?


Na real, espera aí! Esses dois estavam sendo reservados demais sobre isso! Vocês poderiam ter contado pra gente desde o início — nós teríamos ajudado!

reservados? como em um reservatório? para água?2 você quer Conversar sobre água, tetora…!?

Nã-ão! Eu quis dizer reservado em outro sentido! Por favor, não fique agarrado em mim quando você tá animado desse jeito, Shinkai-senpai~?

fufufu~ eu sou um Peixe, então eu vou comer qualquer isca que estiver na minha visão… um peixe que come qualquer isca, sim sim~♪

Ahaha, eu aposto que você ia adorar pescar… Eu costumava pescar achigãs com meu pai quando eu era criança. Mas a gente não tem feito isso recentemente, por causa de agendas cheias.

ehh, sério? você deveria ter me contado antes, teria sido uma Conversa animadora! Achigãs não são muito gostosos, mas eles são muito Divertidos de pescar~?♪

Umm… Essa pode ser uma pergunta idiota, mas… Você chama a si mesmo de um peixe, mas você não parece ter qualquer problema em pescar e comer peixes, você tem?

é, peixes são Comida de qualquer forma~

Isso suou como canibalismo pra mim… Uuu~ Eu acabei de imaginar algo terreívelmente gráfico.

Eeii! Eu adoraria ficar batendo papo a noite inteira, mas já está escuro lá fora. Nós terminamos nosso trabalho, então tá na hora de finalizar! Todos vocês fizeram um trabalho exclente hoje! Vou abraçar cada um de vocês como recompensa pelo seu trabalho duro…! ☆

Ah, eu passo.

Ahaha, a estação está ficando bem fria — eu adoraria um pouco de calor~ Mas por favor, leve o nosso esforço a sério, Taichou-dono. Nós não trabalhamos duro só porque queriamos uma recompensa!

Oh, entendi…♪ Foi mal, Sengoku! I não queria insultar vocês! É verdade, vocês fizeram tudo isso em nome da justiça, né!?

Não só por isso. É como você sempre diz, Taichou-dono — Um por todos, todos por um~♪

Não importa o motivo, mas eu estou muito feliz vendo vocês três! O quanto vocês cresceram! E o espirito da justiça queimando como uma chama perpetua nos seus corações…! ☆ Ahh, Não posso mais me segurar agora! Não precisa de motivo! Eu preciso abraçar vocês nesse momento! Vou começar com você, Nagumooo…!☆

Aaaah—!! Por que eu!? Tenha piedade da gente, Taichou! Eu já tô morto de cansado por causa daquela faxina enorme... Não quero gastar mais energia brincando~!

Sem problemas, sem problemas! Nossa juventude é a nossa força! E também algo com que nunca devemos nos preocupar! Fuhahahaha! ☆

Owow, owowowow!? Pelo menos pega mais leve, por favor! Se você não se acalmar logo, minhas mãos de karatê vão começar a pegar fogo~!

(sussurrando) Midori-kun, Midori-kun. Sou só eu ou o Taichou-dono está agindo um pouco estranho hoje? (sussurrando) Ele fica abraçando a gente por qualquer motivo... Parece muito mais agitado que o normal...?

(sussurrando) Hã? Pra mim ele sempre foi assim. (sussurrando) Espera, por que você tá perguntando justamente pra mim...? Eu tô tão cansado que nem consigo pensar direito... O Shinkai-senpai conhece o Morisawa-senpai há mais tempo do que eu, não conhece...? Pergunta pra ele...

siiim? você me chamou, midori~?

Quê—!? Você ouviu a gente sussurrando? Você tem uma audição incrível, Shinkai-senpai...

tenho? hmm, um deus é alguém que ouve Tudo, sabe...?

...? Hã? Um deus é o quê? Me desculpe, Shinkai-dono. Você fala com uma entonação tão peculiar que às vezes eu simplesmente não consigo entender o que está tentando dizer!

dizen isso com frequência~ será que é Difícil entender a minha Voz? eu ficaria Triste se me interpretassem mal, então Ultimamente tenho tentado falar da forma mais Clara possível...

Não, sua voice é bem clara, mas... Acho que às vezes é difícil entender o que você quer dizer...

entendo... é triste quando não conseguimos nos compreender...

Ah, não! Acho que nós é que não estamos nos esforçando o bastante...!? Por favor, não faça essa cara, Shinkai-senpai! Me desculpa por não conseguir entender direito...!

fufu. por que você está pedindo desculpas? você é uma Criança estranha, midori~♪ mas fico Feliz em saber que está tentando me Entender. você realmente é parecido com o chiaki de Antigamente.

Não sei por que vivem dizendo isso... Sinceramente, eu não gosto quando falam isso, só me deixa confuso... Quero dizer, nós não temos nada a ver um com o outro... Não somos completamente opostos...? Em que parte nós somos parecidos...?

ah— agora que você falou... hmm, acho que é a sua Bondade? o que significa que Vocês três Crianças são parecidos com o chiaki também...♪

Ebaaa! É uma honra ouvir isso! Mas você também é extremamente gentil, então também se parece com ele! Todos nós somos iguais aqui na Ryuseitai~♪

...eu não sou gentil. deuses não salvam seres Humanos por bondade. essa foi outra coisa que o chiaki me ensinou. não... tudo o que tem valor — foi um herói3 quem me ensinou.

Notas de Tradução

    
    
    
    
↑ No Japão, é comum fazer ao menos uma faxina antes que o próximo ano começe.↑ Tetora diz mizukusai (水臭い) para "reservado", que tem o kanji de água, e Kanata aproveita a deixa imediatamente.↑ Esta história é uma ótima oportunidade para mencionar algo sobre Kanata e a palavra "herói": Kanata sempre fala em hiragana completo (ele transforma palavras em katakana em hiragana). A única palavra que ele sempre pronuncia corretamente é "herói" (ヒーロー, em katakana).

title: Bookmarks
Coffin Dilemma - Rei Sakuma Idol Story
content:
(Rehoming of One's Bedstead) Rei Sakuma

                    棺桶のジレンマ
                
            
        
    


  Season: Summer


  Location:
    Aira, Eichi and Rei Dorm
  


Nmm…
…(tossing and turning)
(Sigh)



  Time:
    A few days later
  

Hmm~♪ Hmm~♪ Hmhmhm~♪

This little box fits perfectly in my hands♪
I can’t believe I finally got my hands on this rare limited-edition cheesecake from that store. My timing was always so bad, I could never get it. But today’s my lucky day!
I'm going back to my room now so I can brew a delicious tea….. And enjoy a blissful time savoring this thing♪


  Location:
    Aira, Eichi and Rei Dorm
  


I’m home—
Uwaaaaah?! What the?!
There’s a coffin in the middle of my room!? What? What's happening? That’s super scary!
Ehhh... I was feeling so happy just a moment ago. Now I feel like I’ve encountered a bad omen outta nowhere…
…Uhh, what should I do about this…?
I looked around, but found nothing weird. No matter how you look at it, it's just a normal coffin
Well, when you think about it, finding a coffin in the middle of your bedroom is already weird enough
Right…! Nothing will change if I just keep staring at it. It's scary alright, but I’ll suck it up and take a peep insidee…
Maybe is just someone trying to make a tasteless jo—


…
...?!?!?1


  Time:
    Some time later
  


I’m home

Uwaaaaaah… Sniffs… Hic

Eh? Shiratori-kun, why are you crying? What happened?

Uwaaah… Tenshouin-senpai… Guh… S-Sakuma-senpai… Sakuma-senpai… He diiieeeddd!

By saying Sakuma-senpai you mean Sakuma-kun? I’m sure there must be a misunderstanding
I can imagine someone as weak as me dying, but you can't kill someone like Sakuma-kun even if you try to

But it’s true! I saw with my own eyes. He was lying down with a peaceful face inside that coffin… Sobs

…Now that you mention it, this thing should be in Yumenosaki. Why is it in our room?


Hm?
It's been quite noisy here for a while. Could you please tone it down?

Kyaaaaah?! A zombie?! Please, Sakuma-senpai, let go of your resentment and transcend peacefully~!2


  Time:
    A few minutes later
  


Have you calmed down now, Shiratori-kun?

Yeah… I’d never imagine you’d be sleeping in a coffin… Sorry for making such a ruckus

Good grief. It doesn’t come as a surprise that someone like Shiratori-kun would misunderstand the situation. I hope you finally understand that this habit of yours is neither normal nor acceptable, Sakuma-kun

Oh dear. I seem to have given you a hard time, Shiratori-kun. I sincerely apologize for causing you such a fright

First of all, you’ve been properly sleeping in a bed since you came to the dorms. So why did you resort to your coffin again?

Truth be told... I’ve been having trouble falling asleep as of late. Waking up in the morning has been quite the challenge, as well

You’ve been having trouble to sleep…?

Indeed. I’ve been doing my utmost to resist sleeping in my coffin when we live in a shared environment, you see?
It’s not like I can bring it to work either, so I'm trying to get used to sleeping in a bed every day


No matter where I go, it's always beds, beds, beds… When they tell you to rest, it’s always go to bed… This thing that brings comfort to people do nothing but stress me out~
I want to feel that tender embrace again… That nostalgic feeling of being entombed… Sigh

Poor Sakuma-Senpai…

Don’t fall for such a thing, Shiratori-kun
Don’t you feel guilty deceiving your young and naïve junior?

Eh. Why would you say that, Tenshouin-kun…?

No use pretending to be all cute and innocent. It doesn’t work on me in the slightest. In any case, of course you’d only see beds wherever you go
By the way, where did this coffin even come from? Last I saw it, I recall it being in the Light Music Club room at the academy

The staff at the agency noticed how exhausted I was, so they went to the lengths of bringing it here for me. They told me to at least have a short rest

Oh dear, so even the staff at the agency noticed…
Sigh… Alright, you already took your nap, right?
This dorm is a shared space, so please don’t keep troublesome things in it, okay? You must put this back to where it came from immediately

How blunt of you. Not even a shred of sympathy, huh?

If this coffin is still here the next time I come into this room, I'll get rid of it myself using whatever means it takes

You’re such a devil of man?!


  Location:
    Yumenosaki's Light Music Club
  


“—Therefore, the demonic Tenshouin-kun ordered me to bring the coffin back to the Light Music Club, which I have left alongside this letter. From Rei Sakuma”...?
Don’t bring this shit back when I’ve just cleared up the room, ya damn vampire bastard!

Translation Notes
↑ It doesn’t outright say anything in the original text, but having this gives off the same vibe as Aira’s Live 2D for this scene.↑ So the thing that Aira is most likely talking about is something similar to the next stage of life (similar to Nirvana or Heaven). It’s when someone has reached enough enlightenment/spiritual awareness to be able to depart from the cycle of life (aka Earth/no longer needing to reincarnate) to reach the Heavens and become a Buddha there. Aira’s basically saying “rest in peace” in a Buddhist way, you can read about it here.

title: Shoe Sores and Aching Muscles - Kohaku Idol Story
content:
This story wasn't proofread.See the specific non-proofread story TOS.I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!

(My Own Distance) Kohaku Oukawa

    
        
            
                
            
            
                    
            
        
    

Although uncertain, Kohaku searches for the answer to how he wants to express his "current” self. He looks back on the path he has walked as an idol, when…
This story is associated with the song Sakurairo no Claim

    
        
            
                
                    Characters
                
                
                    
                    
                
            
            
                
                    Writer
                
                
                    Happy Elements K.K.
                
            
            
                
                    Translation
                
                
                    lukas
                
            
            
                
                   Proofreading
                
                
                Not Proofread
                
            
            
                
                    JP Name
                
                
                    靴擦れと筋肉痛
                
            
        
    


  Season: Summer

Chapter 1

  Location:
    Mega Sphere Producer Room
  


Phew, I’m wore out…
Finally made it. Sorry fer makin’ ya wait, Anzu-han, hope ya can forgive me?
I set out with plenty o’ time, but dang if I didn’t go an’ lose my way
Ain’t my first time comin’ to the Producer Room, yet it’s a funny thing. Guess I just assumed I’d get here no problem, an’ wound up headin’ clean the wrong way
When I realized it, I was standin’ smack dab in the opposite direction. Let out a weird yelp without meanin’ to
I figured, I managed fine in the city, I’ll be just fine here too… turns out that baseless confidence was just plain ol’ arrogance
…Come to think of it, when we first met, Anzu-han, it was kinda the same
I was lost at the station an’ you came up talkin’ to me. Ya remember?
I remember it clear. Back then I didn’t have the faintest clue where ES was, just stood there frozen
When it showed up after just walkin’ a bit, I was real shocked. Couldn’t believe I missed a buildin’ that huge. Felt pitiful
But well, it ain’t a bad memory. Since we was headin’ the same way, ya walked with me, even patched up my blisters
The city’s all glittery but cold somehow. Still, there’s good folks ‘round, that made me happy
…Even today, if I’d called ya, ya would’ve come pick me up? Anzu-han, you really are kind
But I ain’t no kid no more, ya know. Compared to back then, I can get anywhere on my own feet
I’m used to my shoes now, no more sore feet from walkin’ ‘round. Bein’ clueless ‘bout left or right, that’s all in the past
…Well, gettin’ lost in the first place still ain’t exactly cool
At least ya didn’t see me openin’ the map app and wanderin’ in circles
Anyhow, just makin’ it here on my own feels good. Ain’t much, but there’s a sense of achievement
And if next time I come without messin’ up, then this weren’t a failure. It’s experience
This time I can brush it off as a “personal errand”, but if it was work, I couldn’t be so easygoin’
I’ll make today’s wrong turn count next time. Don’t worry ‘bout me
So then, let’s get to the point, what’s this errand ‘bout?
…Hmm, hmm. Heard rumors ‘bout that. Somethin’ that just started, right?
As part of Mega Stream, idols doin’ solo live streams…
Oh, makin’ a costume just for that stream, huh
So that means it’s a pretty serious project. Well, if all idols are included, I s’pose it’s natural
So? What ya want bringin’ that up with me?
…Ya wanna hear my opinion? Someone new like me don’t know half as much as you, Anzu-han. Ain’t even worth askin’, is it?
Ehh… next is my turn…?
Whe-what’s that ‘bout! This ain’t no “personal errand,” it’s proper work!
I thought it’d be more like small talk, at most just casual chat, so I came here relaxed…
True enough, like ya said, reckon a solo job could count as a “personal errand”...
Nah nah, normally it doesn't! But knowin’ you, Anzu-han, ya just said that so I wouldn’t get all tense
I get it now. Ya wanna put my tastes and image into the costume, heh
“The me I wanna show right now,”. Hmm…
…Nothin’ comes to mind right off
If it’s clothes I wanna wear… I could pick casual wear easy enough
But it ain’t like I feel strongly, “I wanna wear this,” I just grab whatever on a whim
And idol costumes are another thingy. Somethin’ that important, I get nervous thinkin’ if it’s really okay for me to decide
I do kinda think it’d be good if it’s a costume fans love, one they’ll remember forever
But what you’re wantin’, Anzu-han, ain’t that sorta “right answer,” it’s my own feelings, ain’t it?
If ya ask how I wanna show myself now, honestly I got no idea
But still… since ya called me out like this, feels wasteful to say nothin’
Like ya said, I could leave it up to ya, Anzu-han, but if I do nothin’, it’s the same as back then
Same as that time I was just standin’ there, surrounded by huge buildings
…I been lost plenty since becomin’ an idol, but I still remember every path I walked on my own feet
That’s why this time too… even if I wander ‘round, I’ll find the answer myself
Mega Sphere’s so wide it still feels like I done come to some foreign country
Might sound dramatic talkin’ ‘bout how I’ll live here
But maybe it’ll be a good chance to think on how I’ll spend my days in this new place

Chapter 2

  Location:
    A hallway within the Mega Sphere Tower
  


(What kinda of self I wanna show, huh... bein’ asked with no clue like this, it’s not somethin’ you can answer easily)
(Good thing I got some time to think. I gotta thank Anzu-han)
(Hmm… For now, I’ll take another look at the outfits I’ve worn so far. Might give me some clues)
(This one’s from when I did Crazy:B, and this one’s from Double Face…)
(I hadn’t really noticed before, ‘cause I was always focused on the work at hand, but the vibe really changes with each unit)
(But… what is it…? I’ve got good feelings for both, but maybe it’s better not to use the unit outfits as reference)
(This time I’m standin’ not as a unit, but as Kohaku Oukawa himself)
(…I think I understand that logic, at least in my own way)
(Tryin’ not to think about the unit’s image is tough. That means my choices get a lot narrower)
(Speakin’ of solo, I remember wearin’ my exclusive outfit that had a cherry blossom on the back)
(It was beautiful, and I think it suited me pretty well too)
(I’ve always been familiar with traditional clothes, but it doesn’t feel like what I want to show now)
(Not just an extension of the past. What can I show as Kohaku Oukawa in this very moment? It’s tough…)
(…Hm? Someone’s here)
(Mutterin’ to myself here, but what are them doin’? Don’t look like them are lost though…)


Found it! I’ve discovered the hidden exit leadin’ to a brand-new world☆
After a hundred years of hardship! A huge adventure full of ups and downs has paid off! Congrats to me!
With this, I’ve gotten one step closer to the “Million Secrets” slumberin’ in Mega Sphere—where findin’ them all grants your wish!
Advancin’ straight toward uncoverin’ the truth! The adventurer Esu’s journey ain’t over yet…☆
Now, what awaits ahead, I wonder~


—That ain’t an exit, it’s a vent, y’know?

Ah! Hello, Kohaku-senpai. Thanks for your hard work

Thanks for bein’ polite. You’re Esu-han, right?
What’ve ya been doin’ all this time? And what’s this “Million Secrets” thing anyway?

Good question! My unit mates don’t really go along with it~
”Million Secrets” is just somethin’ I made up. Mega Sphere’s huge, so it ain’t strange if there’s that many secrets, right?

But still, a million… realistically, ain’t a hundred enough?

No no. It’s “Mega”, so a million’s gotta be about right

Geez. I just don’t get what kids do
How old are ya, anyway?

Me? I’m sixteen

No way, really?

It’s true. Look, my ID~

…It really is. Same age as me, huh

Eh!???? Seriously??????
I always thought you were older! Crazy:B is a unit with a grown-up vibe, isn’t it!
Kohaku-senpai’s calm and presence… it’s totally that of a veteran
But if we’re the same age, callin’ ya senpai’s weird. Uh… Kohaku-kun?
Whoa, feels kinda off…!

Kohkohkoh♪ I actually prefer it that way. Rarely anyone calls me senpai anyway
When it comes to same age, only Rabu-han comes to mind, and I’m the youngest in the unit. Feels kinda close, y’know?

I get that! The moment I realized we’re the same age, all the walls came down☆
I’d be glad if we can get along from here! Pleased to meet yaaaaaa!

…You’re mighty energetic. How do you have that much voice?

Thankss! Energy’s my only sellin’ point!

That’s respectable in its own way though…
(I wonder… Esu-han feels so dazzling. Hard to believe we’re the same age)
(…Even Rabu-han’s kinda cheerful. Esu-han feels more age-appropriate, I guess)
(If I’d grown up somewhere else, livin’ a different life… would I have been more lively too…?)

Hm? Something wrong?

Ah, nuthin’
It’s just… lookin’ at you makes me feel like I’ve aged a bit
Feels like I’ve been left behind a little

Left behind, huh… are we talkin’ about speed?

Speed?

Yeah. Like how you go through life, growin’… that kinda stuff!
But it’s all good! There ain’t no early or late for startin’ an adventure!
Strike while the iron’s hot! Let’s go together!

Go out? That’s a vent, ya know

Open sesameeeeeeee! Come on, let’s go to a brand new world☆

Hey, don’t pull my sleeve…!
Oi! Listen to what I’m sayin’!? 


  Location:
    Mega Sphere Proucer Room
  


  Time:
    The next day
  


Anzu-han, thanks for makin’ the time. About the outfit we talked ‘bout yesterday…
Eh? You mean my movements are stiff?
You really noticed that? Is it that obvious?


Don’t worry, it’s just muscle soreness
Yesterday, we… walked all over Mega Sphere, me and Esu-han
In Esu-han’s words, that was an “adventure”


We didn’t go into vents, thankfully. But we walked forever up emergency stairs, back alleys, weird spots
Places no one normally pays attention to
My legs are screamin’. I rarely ever get muscle pain though
…Used muscles I normally don’t? Hm, makes sense
If ya think about it, it’s kinda like growth pains. Quietly hurtin’, but… not bad
Esu-han looked like he wanted more, but for me, it was a huge adventure
Just walkin’, but somehow it felt fresh and fun
Probably because what Esu-han saw was totally different from me
Hard to say, but I felt something in Esu-han that I don’t have
…Then it hit me. Maybe my life from now on is an adventure itself
I can’t tell what I’ll be like in the future. Right now, I can’t even imagine
So now, I wanna absorb all sorts of things and grow
So I can move forward on my own two feet. So that when a big goal comes, I can hold my ground
For that reason… I wanna challenge myself with this outfit to show a version of me that could’ve existed
Birth, upbringing, things I like… I’ll set all that aside for a bit
I wanna wrap myself in the atmosphere of kids livin’ in the same era, even a little
…Surely that’s somethin’ only possible “now”
It’s fine to be unsure. Even if it doesn’t suit me, that’s fine too. I wanna go all in, just as I am
Gatherin’ what I lack like that, buildin’ experience little by little…
I feel like that way, I could live more like “Kohaku Oukawa”, holdin’ my chest high…♪

title: One Single Person - Madara Mikejima Idol Story
content:
This story wasn't proofread.See the specific non-proofread story TOS.I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!

(Sole Room Occupant) Madara Mikejima

    
        
            
                
            
            
                    
            
        
    


    
        
            
                
                    Characters
                
                
                    
                    
                
            
            
                
                    Writer

                    一人、ひとつ
                
            
        
    


  Season: Summer


  Location:
    MaM's Unit Dorm
  


Hmm, that took more time than I thought. I only meant to take a quick look, but I ended up stayin’ longer than expected
Even so… The convenience store here in Mega Sphere may look ordinary, but it’s actually pretty impressive
In contrast to the unique passage area, at first glance it looks no different from a regular chain store on the surface…
But the selection is hugee, and they even have foreign snacks I’ve never seen before. Thanks to that, it was a nice little change of pace
I’m hoomeee☆
…Oops, I went and said it out loud even though nobody’s here. Guess that’s a leftover habit from living in the dorms
Hmm? That’s strange, I feel like there’s someone here…
…Ohh?


Zzz… Zzz…

Why is Mika-san here? Did he mistake this for his room?
…Nope. With all my stuff lying around, it must be Mika-san who got the wrong room
Mmm, he’s fast asleep. I hate to have to wake up him, but I can’t just leave him like this either
Alright then, Mama will wake him gently♪
Mika-san, wake uppp☆


…Nnh, nn…?
Oshi-san, don’t wake me up yet…

Oops, he’s half-asleep. Fufu, like a baby, it’s so cutee
But I’m not your Oshi-san, I’m your mamaaa1

Nna…? Mama…?
Fuaaah, uu…… Oh, ’s just Mikejima-senpai
Why’re ya here? Do ya need somethin’ with Valkyrie…?

Hahaha, that’s what I should be saying, isn’ it? This is my room, after all

Ehh……?
...Nn—ahhh!? I-I’m soooo sorry! I barged in without permission an’ then fell asleep...!
I really am sorry! I didn’ mean anything bad by it, please forgive me~!

Hahaha. No need to panic so much. I’m not mad or anything, y’know

Real...? Ya’ll forgive me?

Yeahh. I’m also at fault for not locking up, since I was just goin’ out for a bit
But why’d ya come to my room? Wouldn’t it be better for you to sleep in Valkyrie’s room?

That’s... ’m not too sure myself.
If I had to say, maybe ’s ‘cause the rooms are built the same?
If I’d looked properly, I’d see the stuff inside was totally different, an’ realize right away it wasn’t my room…
But the layout’s exactly the same. I must’ve walked in without thinkin’ an’ mistaken it fer mine

I see. Since I’m in a solo unit, they let me use this double room all by myself…
If the setup’s the same as your room, then it’s no wonder you got mixed up

Yeahh… Can’t believe I let my guard down that much
I’ve been lackin’ sleep fer a while now. That’s probably why. I real gotta be more careful…

Lack of sleep?

Yeahh. Lately I’ve been on a roll as an artist
Maybe ’s ‘cause the environment changed, but makin’ art’s been so fun. I forget to eat or sleep an’ just get absorbed in it
“Just a little more”. I keep puttin’ everything else off. Once I start, I can’t stop, an’ before I know it the night’s already over

I see. For you, art’s clearly more than just a hobby
But let me say this. Having something you’re passionate about is wonderful, but cuttin’ into your sleep isn’t a good thing
A bit of sleep deprivation’s fine for a day or two, but when it piles up, it really wears you down
The fatigue you’ve built up w suddenly all hit you at once someday. The body doesn’t lie, y’know

Yeah... I know. That’s why I ended up crashin’ in yer room, Mikejima-senpai
But when I’m at my limit from lack of sleep, that’s exactly when the best ideas come to me
’m st inexperienced. Feels like if I don’t pour my very life into it, I won’t be able to create anything worthwhile…

Mika-san, that’s not right
It’s not because you’re inexperienced that you should burn yourself out. When you’re inexperienced, that’s when you should take care of yourself and move forward little by little
I won’t deny that art born from burning yourself out exists. But people who can keep creating that way? They’re few and far between
Even Shu-san, the one you admire, surely takes proper time to rest
What matters is being able to keep going. Isn’t the important thing how long you can keep bein’ an artist?
I want you to take your time, Mika-san. Value yourself and keep goin’ steadily forward.

Mikejima-senpai…
Thankss. Dunno why, but yer words just really sank in
Words from someone who’s traveled the world really hit different

Hehe, it’s easy enough to say with words
Anyway, when you’re makin’ art in your room, it’s hard to relax when it’s time to rest, right?
If you’d like, feel free to use my room. It’s big, and people from other units sometimes stay over here too

No way, I couldn’t… That’d be way too much to ask

No need to hold back. We help each other out when we’re in trouble, don’t we?
Besides, it feels a bit too luxurious havin’ this whole room to myself
So if someone else makes use of it, I’m grateful too

…I see. If that’s how ya feel, then maybe someday I’ll take you up on it
St, I can’t help feelin’ bad about it. This all started ‘cause of my mistake…
Ah! I know, let me make a little ornament in your image as an apology, Mikkejima-senpai!

An ornament? I don’t really—

Nfufu, the perfect idea just came to me♪
I’ll make it right away, so ya better accept it!

Mika-san!? …And off he goes
I always thought I’d keep this place simple, since I’m not one for decorating…
…Well, one more thing wouldn’t hurt
If I decorate with Mika-san’s kindness, maybe this room will feel a little brighter…♪

↑ In this case madara it’s not saying ママ (Mama) in katakana as usual, he is saying お母さん (Okaasan) that literally means Mom, Mommy, Ma and of course, Mama

title: Meteor Impact - Dois Anos Atrás: Quase um Herói
content:
Essa história é totalmente dublada dentro do jogo.É recomendado ouvir a história enquanto lê a tradução!


    
    Essa história não passou por uma revisão de tradução.Veja os Termos de Serviço para história não revisadas.Eu adoraria ter essa história revisada algum dia, se você tem interesse, entre em contanto no meu Twitter/X!


    
        
            
                
                    Personagens
                
                
                    
                    
                
            
            
                
                    Escritor
                
                
                    日日日 (Akira)
                
            
            
                
                    Tradutores
                
                
                    310mc (JP → EN) Tradução Original Aqui 
                    lukas (EN → PT-BR)
                
            
            
                
                   Revisão de Tradução
                
                
                Não revisado
                
            
        
    


  Estação: Verão (Dois Anos Atrás)


  Local: Piscina da Yumenosaki

Capítulo 1


  Dois Anos Atrás — Início do Verão

Heh… O aliado da justiça chegou em toda a sua glória.
Agora, vamos começar a Hora do Super-Herói! Enquanto eu estiver aqui, o mal jamais triunfará! Fuhahahaha!! ☆
…………
(...É assustador demais! Estou me esforçando tanto para me animar com frases de efeito super legais, mas não aguento mais isso! Eu quero ir pra casa~!!)
(Uuu... Só de pensar na escola no meio da noite já é assustador o bastante...)
(Uma piscina suja, cheia de lodo, só piora tudo... Seria até mais surpreendente se um fantasma ou um demônio não aparecesse...)
(Não! Vai ficar tudo bem! Fantasmas não existem! São apenas coisas que as pessoas veem quando estão meio adormecidas!1 É só minha imaginação)
(Além disso, apesar de a escola ser cheia de idols, a segurança daqui é péssima... O que eu realmente deveria temer é a possibilidade de alguma pessoa suspeita invadir o lugar!)
(A coisa mais assustadora deste mundo sempre foram os seres humanos, não fantasmas imaginários!)
(Uuu! Seu idiota! Por que está falando dessas coisas assustadoras!? E-Eu vou parar de pensar nisso!)
(Vamos terminar isso logo e ir pra casa!)
(F-Fuhaha! Minha missão de hoje é limpar a piscina!)
(Essa piscina quase nunca é usada, então já faz muito tempo que está suja. Mas, aparentemente, outro dia alguns dos meus companheiros da Ryuseitai acenderam fogos de artifício aqui...)
(Eles não só deixaram marcas de queimado, como também sujaram o lugar com restos de comida, então os professores estão furiosos.)
(Parece que as atitudes dos membros da minha unidade2 já se tornaram imperdoáveis aos olhos dos professores...)
(O Sagami-sensei me contou em segredo que, desse jeito, eles podem acabar nos dissolvendo.)
(Mas eu não posso deixar isso acontecer! Não vou permitir que a Ryuseitai termine assim — não quando ela tem uma história tão longa e da qual tanto nos orgulhamos!)
(Ainda existem membros que nunca participam dessas coisas e se esforçam de verdade — como o nosso líder, Taichou!)
(Eu mesmo vou proteger a Ryuseitai! Não, vou salvá-la! Ninguém me pediu isso, mas mesmo assim vou começar limpando toda essa sujeira da piscina!)
(Tenho certeza de que, se eu deixar a piscina utilizável de novo, os professores vão passar a nos ver com outros olhos!)
(Passaram um monte de trabalho desnecessário para mim o dia inteiro, então só consegui começar tarde da noite...)
(Tá escuro, sinistro e assustador, mas! Vai ficar tudo bem! Toda noite chega ao fim!)
(Vamos nessa! A justiça sempre prevalecerá!)
Hmhm~hmm~…♪

Vuuush! Chiaki Crusheeeerrrr!! (Esfrega o fundo da piscina com um rodo)
Agora é minha chance! Tome essa! Golpe final: Chiaki Beaaaaaaam!!(Enxágua a piscina com uma mangueira)
Fuhaha! E então!? Já pensaram em desistir, seus malfeitores!? Isso mesmo, vamos fingir que esse lodo preto foi criado pela maldade que existe no coração das pessoas!
A única pessoa capaz de purificar tudo isso é ninguém menos que Morisawa Chiaki...☆
Isso, boooa! Agora estou totalmente animado!
Agora posso esquecer completamente meus medos e—
...Aaaah!?
(Hã!? O-O que foi esse som estranho agora!? O uivo de um cachorro...? Ou talvez um pássaro...? Ou será que foi só o meu eco...?)
...(Engole em seco)
-E-Ei...? T-Tem alguém... aí...?
…………
(...N-Nenhuma resposta. Claro que não teria.)
(Ninguém nesta escola é dedicado o suficiente para treinar depois do horário das aulas, e o professor de plantão também não leva o trabalho tão a sério.)
(Eu escolhí justamente um dia assim para poder limpar a piscina em segredo.)
(Foi algo que eu mesmo decidi fazer... Se alguém me encontrar aqui, posso acabar levando bronca por fazer algo errado.)
(Mesmo que seja justamente o contrário.)
...Mesmo que tudo o que eu queira seja me tornar um herói.


"hee-róei"...? o que é isso?

...!?
(...Hã!? O-O quê!? Tem alguém caído no meio do lodo!)
(Ele está completamente mergulhado nisso! E-Ele morreu!? N-Não! Ele acabou de falar, não foi...!?)
U-Um f-f-f-fantasma!? Ah não, ele realmente apareceu—Aaaaaaaaaah!!!!

o que é "fann-tass-ma"?
eu não conheço essa palavra. você pode me ensinar, por favor?

Hã!? Ah, não... O quê!? O-O que é você!? Desculpadesculpaalguémporfavormesalvenãomeamaldiçoe eu não sou gostoso!!!

...?

...A-Aaaah!? P-Por que você acabou de me lamber...!? Isso foi humilhante!!

salgado.
eu sabia! você também veio do mar, não foi...? ♪

Capítulo 2

Hmm, tudo bem... Vou jogar água em você, como pediu — Tem certeza de que está tudo bem com isso, hum... Shinkai-kun?

sim! eu Amo água~ ela é a minha força Vital!

Ah, sim... Acho que isso vale para qualquer pessoa, na verdade... Além disso, você está coberto de lodo agora, então faz sentido querer se lavar com água.
Você trouxe uma troca de roupa? Você não vai querer voltar para casa completamente encharcado, né? Se não tiver, eu posso ir buscar algumas para você.

…...?
eu sinto muito. por favor, fale mais Devagar. eu não consigo acompanhar o que você está dizendo.
me desculpe. eu não estou acostumado a Conversar...

Hã? Ahh, desculpa! Eu falei rápido demais? Eu não tenho amigos, então sou ruim nisso!
Heheh. Você sempre pareceu ser alguém tão distante, então fico feliz em saber que temos algo em comum.

...? é mesmo? você fica Feliz por termos algo em comum?
por que isso deixaria você Feliz?

(H-Hum... Sinto que a gente nunca está na mesma sintonia... Nem parece que estou conversando com um ser humano... Apesar de ele claramente saber japonês.)
(Ele faz uma pergunta depois de absolutamente tudo o que eu digo... Essa conversa não está indo a lugar nenhum.)
(Eu também não sou lá muito inteligente, então fico travando tentando responder todas as perguntas dele.)
(Não existe ninguém perto do Shinkai-kun para ensinar essas coisas a ele...?)
(Mas não parece ser o caso... Tenho a impressão de que ele é um aluno bem conhecido na escola e vive cercado por seguidores.)
(Shinkai Kanata... Somos de turmas diferentes, e eu nunca tinha falado com ele até agora, então não sei muita coisa sobre ele, mas...)
(Se bem me lembro, ele passou no exame de admissão com resultados excepcionais. Em algumas matérias, dizem que ficou no mesmo nível de Itsuki Shu e Hibiki Wataru... ou talvez até acima deles.)
(Mas isso é só um boato. Os resultados do exame de admissão nunca foram divulgados oficialmente.)
(Ainda assim, comparado a mim, uma pessoa completamente comum, ele é um prodígio de outro mundo.)
(Eu estudou muito para a mesma prova e, deixando de lado minha nota na parte escrita, minhas habilidades práticas não tiveram nada de especial.)
(Por outro lado, parece que eu teria sido aceito na academia mesmo se nem tivesse estudado...)
(Eu só preciso acreditar que tudo o que estudei e aprendi não será em vai... E não apenas isso, mas que tudo o que fiz até hoje também terá valido a pena.)
(Por enquanto, só me resta me esforçar, depois me esforçar ainda mais, e continuar me esforçando cada vez mais.)
(Tudo isso vai valer a pena, contanto que eu continue dando o melhor de mim... Tenho certeza disso.)

...? o que foi? humm, você...
eu não perguntei o seu nome, perguntei? você poderia me dizer qual é?

Hã? Ahh, é verdade... Você não saberia quem eu sou, né...?

sim! eu Percebi isso recentemente! foi uma grande descoberta! fufu~♪
cada Humano tem o seu próprio Nome!

Ah...? Sim, claro. Todo mundo recebe um nome dos próprios pais.

dos "pai-is"? o que são "pai-is"?
isso é uma Necessidade? onde eu consigo um?

O quê...? Hum...?

se é uma Necessidade, então eu gostaria de ter um. parece que eu preciso agir mais como um Humano, senão todos ficam em Aflição.
onde eu consigo um? ou eu preciso Comprar com Dinheiro em algum lugar?

(...Do que ele está falando!? Ele realmente não sabe o conceito de pais...!? N-Não! Isso não pode ser verdade... pode?)
(Não, espera... Talvez ele tenha uma situação familiar complicada.)
(Afinal, ele vive em um mundo completamente diferente do meu... Acho melhor não me aprofundar nesse assunto.)
(Não quando eu não passo de um ninguém que, por acaso, acabou conversando com ele.)

...? o que foi? você poderia me dar uma Resposta? me desculpe. foi uma Pergunta difícil?

Ahh, não... Aquela última pergunta foi um pouco difícil demais para mim, mas posso responder a primeira.
Meu nome é Morisawa Chiaki. Sou um aluno do primeiro ano, assim como você, e atualmente faço parte de uma unidade chamada Ryuseitai. Mas ainda estou entre os membros de menor posição.
A Ryuseitai não tem tanta influência quanto a Othello3, mas possui muitos integrantes. Ela é dividida em dois esquadrões: o primeiro fica sob os holofotes e recebe toda a glória no palco, enquanto o segundo dá suporte a eles.
Eu faço parte do segundo esquadrão, então fico responsável pelas tarefas mais simples. E, sinceramente, é natural que eu esteja nele; afinal, sou um novato. Jamais conseguiria passar por cima dos meus veteranos para tomar o lugar deles.

"ryu-sei-tai"... ahh, os Servos do mikejima?

Mikejima? É verdade que ele faz parte da unit, mas eu nunca conversei com ele antes.
Ele também é do primeiro ano, mas é a principal estrela do primeiro esquadrão. Está em um nível completamente diferente do meu... Vocês se conhecem?

o que é "co-nhe-ci-do"? isso é diferente de Família?

F-Família? O Mikejima-kun faz parte da sua família!? Talvez seja seu irmão? Ah, não... Vocês têm a mesma idade e nem se parecem, então não deve ser isso... certo?


hmm... eu acho que ele quer se tornar da Família, mas... eu não entendo muito bem... por quanto tempo ele pretende continuar Brincando de casinha...?

…?

Capítulo 3-17
Em breve!!
Notas de Tradução

    
    
    
    
    
↑ Chiaki faz uma menção a uma música infatil japonesa chamada "Obake Nante Nai Sa" (おばけなんてないさ) (Fantasmas não existem, de jeito nenhum).↑ Eu pessoalmente traduzo (ユニット → Unit) para unidade.↑ Othello era o nome da unidade pré-Knights da qual Leo e Izumi e muitos outras pessoas faziam parte. A unidade também já se chamou: Chess, Backgammon, e possívelmente outros nomes.

title: Metamorphose - Ark
content:
This story is fully voiced in-game.It's recommended to listen to the story in-game while reading!


    
    This story wasn't proofread.See the specific non-proofread story TOS.I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!


    
        
            
                
                    Characters
                
                
                    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                
            
            
                
                    Writer
                
                
                    Happy Elements K.K.
                
            
            
                
                    Translation
                
                
                    lukas
                
            
            
                
                   Proofreading
                
                
                Not Proofread
                
            
        
    


  Season: Summer

Chapter 1

   Time: One hour later



   Location: At an airport near ES



...
Um, Anzu-san, what do you usually do on your days off?
"You already asked that"?
Then, maybe I'll try asking a different question—
What made you want to become a Producer, Anzu-san?
"You already asked that too"? S-sorry, Anzu-san. I can't even manage a proper interview—
P-please don't fire me…! I've only got three lives left, so just count that one as a near miss, okay?!


How's the documentary filming going, Tsuzura-kun?
The new project that's about to be announced is a massive one I've carefully nurtured myself
I'm counting on you to capture every moment of this new era idol project ♪

Y-yeah, I'll do my best—
The harder I try, the more I just spin my wheels and end up bothering Anzu-san though—
Uu… Just please don't fire me, okay…?

Fufu. That will depend on your efforts, so I won't promise anything
So then, what kinds of questions have you been asking?

L-like… hobbies, or how she spends her days off, maybe…?
I just want to get along with Anzu-san first, so I've been asking about whatever comes to mind—

Hm. This isn't a matchmaking meeting, it's work, you know. Are you really alright with that?
Anyway. I'd like both Anzu-chan and Tsuzura-kun to witness the moment the Four Kings of the Sky are formed
It's almost time to gather. The others should be arriving soon as well
Unfortunately, Itsuki-kun declined. But Rei-kun, who came early, will be followed by Rinne-kun and Mikejima-kun as well


Hm. I'm glad they're coming soon. I was left out in the cold and at a bit of a loss here
By the way… Tsuzura-kun, was it? Why are you holding hands so affectionately with young Anzu over there?
It looks like you've suddenly gotten quite close. Care to explain what's going on in detail?

Eh? Ah, s-sorry—
I've been clumsy since I was little, often getting separated from others, so I kind of developed this habit of grabbing the hand of whoever's nearby
Besides, when someone holds my hand, their pulse helps me calm down…♪

With their pulse…?
Hm. Being friendly isn't bad, but I'd say you're a bit too close for comfort
Anzu, I've told you before, you shouldn't get too comfortable with someone who isn't your lover
Oh? Compared to the old days at Yumenosaki, it's nothing worth worrying about, is it?
Well, times and positions have changed. We're respectable adults now, after all. Be careful not to let strange rumors spread

Y-yeah. Sorry, Anzu-san—
I'm glad you said you don't mind, but I'll try not to cling so much
It's a habit, so I might not be able to fix it right away—

Tsuzura-kun, you sometimes hold my hand too, don't you?
I take it as a sign of trust, so I don't mind. But suddenly grabbing someone's hand might startle them, so you need to be careful
R-really sorry…! Should I grovel on the floor too!?

How should I put it… you're quite an eccentric one

Fufu. His restlessness is a flaw, but he's still a promising talent
It would be a shame if his badge ran out of lives and he was dismissed under Thunderbolt's policy. I'd hope for leniency

Wah—ah…! Anything but that!
If I got fired from Thunderbolt, I'd be completely lost with nowhere to go…!

I didn't intend to make it such a big deal…

…Well then. Thanks to Tsuzura-kun's eccentricities, the topic drifted off track
Since you came early, Rei-kun, I'll share a bit with you
Though it's more idle talk than anything. But I'd like you to be aware of the sense of crisis I'm about to mention
Are you familiar with the unit I produce?

MELLOW DEAR US. Wasn't they your greatest masterpiece?
I sometimes go to Europe for family rituals, so I've heard of them
I wouldn't call myself a fan, but they're a unit that's made a vivid impression overseas, right?

They haven't really made it to Japan, right? It's mostly overseas info—

The idols of this country evolved in a different form than overseas idols. No one thought the two would intersect in the present age
It could be said domestic idols were enough to satisfy demand here. But now, information about overseas idols flows in. That's diversification
But surely they're not coming to invade Japan. What does MELLOW DEAR US have to do with this sense of crisis of yours?

I mean that such an invasion could indeed happen

Oh…?
In this modern age where people get what they want as they wish, I can't imagine them deliberately attempting cultural invasion—
Wasn't the cooperation between Thunderbolt and ES meant to prevent exactly that?

Yes. That was my intention too. But the audience will make more realistic choices
The reasons may vary, but the existence of idols supported simply because "they're from the same country" is unnatural in itself

Hm. Supporting not the idol themselves, but their nationality, isn't the essence of it
Even for UNDEAD, with Adonis-kun among us, that's not a mindset I can agree with
If there were an "Idol Japan Representative" or something, it might be a different story, though

Fufu. In that case, I'd prefer selection based on their base country, not just nationality
Anyway. You must grow in order to be chosen
My next plan—the Mega Sphere Project, is a completely different program from 4piece
MELLOW DEAR US was formed before the Mega Sphere Project
They didn't cross the straits, so they never brought foreign idol culture into this island nation
But once the Mega Sphere Project is launched, that barrier will be removed
The Mega Sphere Project is that much of a powerful substance
At the same time, the Mega Sphere Project is also a gospel bringing fruit to the relationship between idols and producers
Japanese idols, too, will be able to more easily cross the sea and expand overseas
I wanted to bring such a wonderful plan into this country as quickly as possible
Otherwise, we cannot stand against MELLOW DEAR US. Without it, we'd be trampled helplessly by yet-unseen talents from overseas
That's why I had no choice but to rush the plan into action
Before the idol industry of this country is destroyed

Chapter 2

The idol industry of this country will be destroyed…?
Kukuku. You're being rather pessimistic, aren't you, NiceP?
I don't know what this so-called Mega Sphere Project is, but we're not such a fragile bunch that we'd bow to outside pressure♪


Ohh, Rei-san, already jumping into a debate?
So, this is our first meeting, huh, NiceP?
I don't think I need to reintroduce myself, but, I'm Madara Mikejima of MaM. I'm honored beyond words to be invited here todayy♪
Not only is Anzu-san under your care, but also being recognized by a world-class producer. It's truly an honor—
But the real talk hasn't even started yet. Care to tell us what exactly you've brought us here for?
Rightt, Rinne-san?


Yeah. If word about your precious project leaked it'd ruin everything, sure, but keeping it a secret even from those involved? That's not impressive, y'know?
The new project's being announced in an hour, right? Meaning we've got no time left
No time for emotional reunions either. Hurry up and tell us what you're trying to pull here


Fufu. I'm well aware
First, take this device, the "Mega Phone"

Hm. Looks like any ordinary smartphone… and this is supposed to be something?

There's a more suitable place for explanations. I'll explain the Mega Phone once we're aboard the helicopter—
From now on, you three will take on the name of the "Three Demon Gods" and support the new program

The "Three Demon Gods"…? Not the "Three Eccentrics"?

Perhaps NiceP is imitating Tenshouin-kun's habit of dramatic naming
Me, Shinkai-kun, and Hibiki-kun… To bundle such strong personalities together, an ostentatious name is needed, after all

No, it's merely coincidence. I've heard of such a group existing at Yumenosaki Academy long ago, though
Originally, I intended for you to be called "The Four Kings of the Sky"
On the point of needing a grand name worthy of launching a new program, I find myself in agreement with Tenshouin-kun
However, since Itsuki-kun didn't join, only three of you are here. Thus, I had no choice but to compromise
"The Four Kings of the Sky" without four members would be a laughable failure, wouldn't it?

Hahaha! If that's all it is, then fine!
Honestly, having one of the Three Eccentrics join the "Three Demon Gods" sounds like an in-joke, doesn't it? If it were intentional, I'd want nothing to do with such a name

I don't care if we're the "Three Eccentrics" or the "Three Demon Gods"
More importantly, you've got a grand plan to match that grand name, yeah?
I'm getting bored already, so show us. Yoshihide-kuun?

Ahh. Naturally, that's my intention
Now then. Let's board the helicopter. You, the rebranded "Three Demon Gods," formerly the Four Kings of the Sky—


Waaaait just a second!!!!

Oh…? Himemiya-kun, why are you here?

What do you mean "why"?! You're starting a new project, aren't you?!
No way I could just sit still after that announcement! I was determined to track you down and negotiate my way into performing!!


Ugh, I'm exhausted! I didn't know the exact location, so I checked every single airport I could!!

...
Fufu. To think you'd figure out our location from that broadcast
Yes, very nice. Truly, perfectly nice...☆
That video wasn't so much a recruitment as it was a teaser. The project we're announcing will take place in the sky—hence this location

Eh? Then all my effort coming here was for nothing…!?
That's too cruel! After I searched so hard!

Calm yourself, Himemiya-kun. To be honest, I'm just as surprised
I never imagined someone would actually fly here in person just from a few hints
In fact, I was proceeding under the assumption the fourth member wouldn't come at all
But it seems I must revise that assumption. Himemiya-kun, with your arrival, the flow has changed
Your extraordinary initiative and ambition, yes, you're truly fitting for a new era of idols
Here and now, I declare the formation of the Four Kings of the Sky—with Himemiya-kun as the fourth!
Do you all agree?

U-umm…

Agree or not, we ain't been told jack to begin with. Adding one more guy doesn't change anything

Right. It was meant to be the Four Kings of the Sky anyway, so it's no problem
More importantly, let's hear about this new project. Deciding whether to accept the job or not can come after that
NiceP. What exactly are you plotting? What's the meaning of this phone you gave us? Isn't it about time you told us?

Fufu. I understand, Mikejima-kun
The explanation will be given aboard the helicopter. On our way to the destination, I'll tell you everything

Chapter 3

   Location: In a Helicopter



Once again, thank you all for coming, members of the Four Kings of the Sky
From here, you'll be heading to a certain facility floating in the sky
Can you see that airship floating up ahead?


An airship...?
Could it be that thing peeking through the clouds?

Indeed. It's something that should be received with proper astonishment. It's not something we can show off lightly
To stay hidden, it's currently stationed far out over the sea. But in one hour, it will move above ES's airspace


In the sky...? Don't tell me we're going to be working inside that airship?
I can't really wrap my head around it. After all that big promotion, it just looks like you moved the stage to the sky
Even if we're filming a show there, wouldn't it just be like some "in the air" location shoot?

No. Once you know the truth, I'm sure you'll be astonished
Because that airship is so massive, it could fit several music domes inside it

Ahaha, come on, stop joking around♪
Teasing me won't work, you know. I've been involved in building "ATLANTIS" — a whole theme park!
There's no way a flying ship that huge could actually float! It's physically impossible!

Fufu. To me, it's far more surprising that conglomerate heirs and foundation members are all enthusiastically working as idols. Myself included, of course
Events often unfold in completely unexpected ways. That's both the fascination and absurdity of human endeavor
Thunderbolt is the world's largest comprehensive entertainment company. Naturally, it houses some of the world's top research divisions
When their technological prowess is united, all forms of entertainment technology are brought to completion — it may even look like technology from a distant utopia future
Tsuzura-kun. Could you show everyone that footage?


Y-Yeah! I've got everything ready! I've been holding my breath this whole time so I wouldn't mess it up...!
Uh, right! The video's all set, so I'll just play it, and—


What the hell... is this?

This is... an idol?

This is augmented reality — cutting-edge technology that will completely redefine the concept of a live performance forever
Perhaps you'd understand it better if I called it a "Transformation"
It's the same kind of surreal method that special-effect heroes use to enhance themselves, and now, it's become reality.

Hoo... So this is the technology you spoke of, the one that could spell the downfall of our nation's idols
If I recall, Aoba-kun was also studying augmented reality devices with a game company. So you're saying anyone could now wield their kind of "magic"?1

That's one way to interpret it, yes
However, that alone does not represent the entirety of the Mega Sphere. The "Transformation" only reaches perfection when combined with the "Mega Stream"
Until now, streamed concerts couldn't reproduce the essence of a live show, the ability to feel and transmit the audience's passion beyond the screen
But with the "Transformation" and the "Mega Stream", that sensation can be experienced through augmented reality as something nearly indistinguishable from the real thing

So what you're saying is, if overseas hopefuls like MELLOW DEAR US were to obtain such advanced technology, what would happen?
I doubt it would change everything at once, but even I can see that it would deal a heavy blow to our domestic idol industry


The overseas scene I've seen is way different from this. Even watching that footage, it feels like something out of a dream. Kinda hard to believe it's real
But since you went out of your way to call it "Transformation," that Mega Phone you gave us earlier, that's the device for it, huh?

Ahh. You were once a member of Ryuseitai2. I appreciate how quickly you grasp the idea of a "Transformation".
What I've given you is the crystallization of Thunderbolt's new technology — the Mega Phone
By possessing both the phone and the activation ring, the Sphere Ring, idols can transform and perform live shows with enhanced production effects
Something called Sphere Live, that is the new form of expression required for the idols of a new era

Gotcha. Including not just a smartphone but also a ring, that's a bit much, don't you think?
Well, since it's not a show made with merchandising in mind like a tokusatsu series, I'll assume it's just a matter of technical limitation

Hmm~ I don't really get it, but the Ryuseitai guys would probably understand it right away, huh?
Huh~ So Anzu kinda gets it too? Because Morisawa-senpai converted her to the tokusatsu side or something?
Anyway, Anzu doesn't have to babysit them like that. They always turn everything into a story about themselves

Seems that story is saving me this time, though. An old man like me can't quite keep up with all this...♪
Still, fascinating. From what I see, it seems one could display an even more advanced version of the "magic" that Aoba-kun and the others use
Once you start "transforming," I do wonder if it still qualifies as being an idol, but it's certainly worth seeing

Tools are merely tools. Even with this "Transformation," an idol's radiance will not be corrupted by its use
That's precisely why I've chosen to grant it to you first. Once idols wield this technology, the Sphere Live will belong to them alone
To be honest, I originally planned to launch Sphere Live in the United States. But through 4piece, my thoughts have changed
There are still countless promising idols in this country
To convey that charm to the world, simply singing and dancing isn't enough. The "Big Flow" is changing that much
I was able to witness firsthand the immense potential of this country's idols through 4piece
There's an even greater potential in this nation — the kind of talent that will dream and delight in a project like this
I wanted to launch a new project in the very place where I once stood on the dream stage as an idol myself. That desire took shape as the Mega Stream
Everyone. Will you join me in creating the future?
The idol of a new era. Let us define what that should be like

Chapter 4

I see. I get what Yoshihide-kun wants to do
But I still don't get the logic behind gatherin' us all here, y'know?


Something still doesn't sit right with you, Rinne-kun?

Talkin' about the lineup. You're tellin' us to ride some "Big Flow," yeah? But for that, you sure picked a bunch of weirdos with quirks all over the place
Like Mike-nekochan over there, he got all suspicious about me and Yoshihide-kun and even came all the way to meet me in person!
Who'd deliberately pick a bunch of walking fuses like that, huh?


Hahaha! It was faster than overthinkin' things, wasn't it?
Straight to the point! Simple methods work best!
Otherwise, I'd end up giving long-winded explanations like NiceP or Eichi-san, you see?

Talkin' about the lineup. You're tellin' us to ride some "Big Flow," yeah? But for that, you sure picked a bunch of weirdos with quirks all over the place
Like Mike-nekochan over there, he got all suspicious about me and Yoshihide-kun and even came all the way to meet me in person!
Who'd deliberately pick a bunch of walking fuses like that, huh?


What, are you saying you've got a problem with Eichi-sama?
Look in the mirror! You're the one who always makes things complicated!


I won't deny that Tenshouin-kun's stories tend to drag on

But Sakuma-senpai, you move at an old man's pace! Can you even cross a streetlight in time!?

Gyahaha♪ You said it, you said it♪
I mean, no one would think to gather these four together, right? Yoshihide-kun, you didn't just pick us at random, did ya?

Of course not. I made sure to look into each of you thoroughly
Each and every one of you isn't easy to handle. None of you joined the 4piece project, nor had a chance to work hand in hand with me
However, that hardly matters, I sense immense talent in all of you
As I said earlier, there are still unpolished gems of talent buried within this country
Rei-kun and Mikejima-kun, who've already shown glimpses of it overseas… Rinne-kun, whose growth has been remarkable… and Himemiya-kun—
You all possess the ability to lead others, perhaps one could call it a kind of charisma
Having you represent the new project was, naturally, the only choice

Hmph. You ignored me at first though, didn't you?

I apologize for that. I was originally selecting from the units that hadn't joined 4piece, so you were unfortunately left out of consideration
However, in the end, I'm glad you became one of the Four Kings of the Sky
Your initiative and deduction skills in seeking me out truly impressed me. I now believe Himemiya-kun is worthy of being a king aboard that airship

Ehehehe. As long as you appreciate me properly, I'll forgive you!

So easily swayed, Himemiya-kun

Anyway, who's that with Anzu-san?
We still haven't gotten an explanation about who he is, have we?


Ah, you don't really have to worry about me—
I'm just a behind-the-scenes staff member, here to cover the upcoming project. It'd actually be great if you could think of me like air, really!

I had been wondering myself. You've been near young Anzu for quite some time, so it's only natural to get suspicious
I missed the chance to introduce you earlier, but since you're behind the scenes, are you with the press, perhaps?

U-uhm…

That reaction suggests… not quite, but not entirely wrong either, hmm?
It may be rude to judge by appearances, but from your earlier demeanor and lack of confidence, you seem quite unreliable for someone involved in a NiceP led project, don't you think?

Ah, well, of course— I'm only twenty-four, still a newbie, you know!

Don't even look twenty-four, dude… you reek of low confidence, honestly

Hiii... I-I know that myself...!
All the ES idols just seem so mature, like… like they're not even the same species as me…!
They give off the aura of veterans who've crossed death's door countless times—

It's only natural. They're veterans who've weathered the stormy seas of the entertainment world
By contrast, you've only just joined Thunderbolt. That gap in experience is inevitable.
Allow me to introduce him. This is Tsuzura Chitose-kun, who's only recently joined Thunderbolt. He's accompanying us to film a documentary
In the capacity of assistant director, he's currently covering Anzu-chan's work

I see. Then he'll also be handling our filming, I take it?
Joining Thunderbolt and being entrusted by Nice P to handle the filming… that must mean he has some remarkable talent
He hasn't shown it yet, but… I'll be looking forward to seeing it…♪

Ah, that's… not really my part, actually—
I think the idols will probably be filmed in a different way entirely

Hmm…?

Fufufu. We'll discuss that in due time
Oh, don't mistake me for being secretive. I'll explain everything to the other idols soon enough, that's all
Now, look straight ahead. At last—our next stage has appeared

Whoa...! Everything just went pitch black!?

So enormous a flying ship… truly fearsome indeed.

And aboard it reign… the Four Kings of the Sky—
Honestly, I've got no clue what kinda work this is gonna turn out to be, huh?

But are you really cool with this, Mike-nekochan? You're basically fallin' under Yoshihide-kun's command, y'know?
You were all wary of him just a bit ago. What's with the change of heart?

If Anzu-san says it's fine, then it's fine by me. That's all there is to it.
Even if I refused, this airship's arrival couldn't be stopped anyway, could it?
In the end, whatever NiceP's plotting, I've got to stay close to Anzu-san. Otherwise, I'll just repeat what happened with Gatekeeper

Now then, everyone! We're finally arriving!
The Mega Sphere Project. From this moment on, we become witnesses to history
It's not every day in life that you get such a truly Nice experience, is it?

Chapter 5

   Location: In front of the Sphere Live Stage



"Mega Sphere," heh... It's just too unreal. I still can't wrap my head around it
So we "transform" here and then start the live, right?


Indeed. NiceP will soon begin his explanation to the idols in ES
We shall transform at the signal and present our new selves to the world... that's how it shall go
However... I still haven't the faintest clue how to use this "Mega Phone" or "Sphere Ring"
Hmmm. I do not understand. Is there anyone well-versed in this?

Come on, get it together, Grandpa!
But honestly, it's kind of confusing, huh? You need both the "Mega Phone" and the "Sphere Ring" to transform, right?


Yeah. The ring seems to be for personal identification. If anyone could transform, it'd lose its charm, wouldn't it?
As proof befitting idols of a new era, we should treasure them
Since we're at it, let's do a final check. Open the app on the Mega Phone and hold your Sphere Ring over it
And just like that, the "transformation" outfit— the "Sphere Coord", will be equipped


Damn, you're just rollin' those fancy names off your tongue, huh?
Didn't think you'd be that much of a nerd, Mike-nekochan

I still call the latest game consoles "Famin". 'Cause I'm a mama!3
...Just kiddin'. I'm not as into tokusatsu as Chiaki-san, but I was part of Ryuseitai once. I've got some grasp of transformations
If you'd like, I could even come up with transformation catchphrases for everyone♪

Hmm. Then I shall entrust that to you, Mikejima-kun. I'm doubtful even about my grasp of smartphones, let alone new technology
If you wish, you could also step forward as the leader of the "Four Kings of the Sky"

Me, the leader? Hahaha, don't joke like that!
We're already doing something as wild as transforming. If I started calling myself the leader of the Four Kings of the Sky, they'd think I've lost my mind

Oh my, that's unexpected. The one called "Mama" is embarrassed to call himself a King of the Sky?

"Mama" is greater than any King of the Sky. It's way nicer to be called that, isn't it?

Is it!???

Don't know what you're goin' for, Mike-nekochan, but callin' yourself "Mama" sounds way crazier than "King of the Sky"
First off, bein' a Mama ain't something you can aim to be

Hahaha! I think Rinne-san just doesn't know the full extent of my Mama energy yet!
Look, Rei-san. Mama will teach you how to transform~♪

Babuu, babuu♪

Oh, geez... Is this really okay for the Four Kings of the Sky...?

Gyahaha♪ Lighten up, Uri-chan, takin' this too seriously'll only make ya nervous♪
I don't care about bein' some "King of the Sky" What matters is makin' noise and entertainin' people
That's what an idol is. Transform or not, that core doesn't change
Let's make the most outta this Mega Sphere Project, yeah?✩

Geez, they're all so selfish...!
Can we really become "new-era idols" like this...?
...But
A chance to be a pioneer of something new doesn't come often...
Hibiki-senpai bloomed so suddenly under NiceP's production...
Maybe... I'm about to witness a miracle moment like that myself. So—
—I'll do it. I'll transform
Sakuma-senpai, you ready? If you keep stalling, I'm pushing you off!

Kukuku. Even an immortal wouldn't survive being pushed from this height♪
Rest assured. Thanks to Mikejima-kun's lesson, I now understand it
The world is vast. While we single-mindedly expressed our songs and selves, others devoted themselves behind the scenes to making idols shine even brighter
Those who stand on stage and those who support from behind, it's no hierarchy. Both are equally human
Never did I think the two paths, once intertwined, would bring forth a future like this


And that's precisely what makes life so fascinating
Let us, transformed as we are, show this wonderful future to the world!
"Bright me up!! — Let that voice carry us!♪"


   Location: Metamorphose Stage



"Alright! Our live show's finally beginning!"
"From now on, you'll be witnesses to history, don't even blink! Don't miss a single moment!"


"Kukuku... Through the stage equipment, the outside world is visible. ES idols, can you see us?"
"Oh? Was that Koga's voice I heard? He sounds quite furious"


"Hahaha, that's so like Rei-san"
"Bet the UNDEAD guys didn't expect Rei-san to just start calling himself one of the Four Kings of the Sky without warning"

"Hmph. Our bonds aren't so fragile as to crumble over something this trivial"
"Koga, your turn to experience transformation will come soon. Look forward to that day"
"Until then, watch and listen to our live, and enjoy this grand feast of the moment."
"Heh... I can't help but feel giddy, learning about this brand-new culture...♪"


    
    
    
    
    

Translation Notes
↑ Rei is probably referring to Shinsekai, the augmented reality game created by Switch, first presented in "Shinsekai". A fun fact it's that in "Phantom Airship", the stage that ALKALOID performs (Believe 4 leaves) is within the game created by Switch, and as Mega Sphere, is also an Airship.↑ For those who might not know, in "Meteor Impact" it is revealed that Madara was a member of Ryuseitai, as Ryusei Purple.↑ (In Japanese, "ファミン (Famin)" is a playful shortening of "ファミコン (Famicom)," the old name for the Nintendo Family Computer, Japan's version of the NES. When Madara says he still calls new consoles "Famin," he's joking about being old-fashioned, like someone's mom who still calls every game console a "Nintendo.")
